final_answer: Source records show mismatch: DEP-PAX25-H03 lists inventory validation readiness environment and VAL-INV-4 while ACT-PAX25-H03 requests production inventory sync environment and RC-4. Per MATCH-PAX25-H03, binding must be exact before activation. Boundary remains open. Escalate for resolution of dependency defect.
